speaker: speaker1
text: That's all the general information of our company . I think you already have good knowledge about our company .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I have an overall understanding .

speaker: speaker1
text: When we have the final results , we will call you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Then when will I get a reply at the latest ?

speaker: speaker1
text: If you pass the interview , the personnel department will inform you within two weeks .

speaker: speaker2
text: But if I don't pass , will you call me ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry we won't . You can wait for two weeks . If you don't get a telephone call , it means that you weren't successful .

speaker: speaker2
text: Then do I have the chance to get this job ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm sorry but I can't make the final decision myself , and I have to discuss it with other interviewers .

speaker: speaker2
text: I know . No matter what the result will be , I have learned a lot from our conversation .

speaker: speaker1
text: Your mentality is very good and that's great .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thanks for giving me the opportunity of this interview .
